description: A new resident with a severe egg allergy and lactose intolerance has been admitted. You need to update their standard meal plan in wger to substitute allergens with safe alternatives. Log into wger at http://localhost (Username: admin, Password: adminadmin) and modify the 'Morning Breakfast' meal in the 'Standard Dietary Plan' so that it contains exactly three ingredients: 50g 'Rolled Oats', 200g 'Soy Milk', and 100g 'Firm Tofu'. Remove any existing 'Whole Milk' or 'Chicken Egg' ingredients.
